# Navneet Singh Arora - AI & Full Stack Engineer Portfolio

Expertise in Machine Learning, Intelligence Automation (n8n), and High-Performance Full Stack Systems. Based in Hamburg, Germany.

## Core Telemetry
- **Role**: Machine Learning & Full Stack Engineer
- **Specialization**: AI Agents, Intelligent Automation (n8n Expert), Backend Architecture
- **Location**: Hamburg, Germany (Open to global opportunities)
- **Experience**: 6+ Years (NICE Ltd., Cognizant, Repath)

## Technical Stack (Ranked by Proficiency)
- **Intelligence**: Google Gemini, Claude Code, PyTorch, LangChain, Transformers, FastMCP
- **Automation**: n8n (Power User & Creator), GitHub Actions, Dagster
- **Backend**: Python (FastAPI), TypeScript (Node.js), PostgreSQL, Hasura
- **Cloud/Infra**: GCP, Docker, Cloudflare, Tailscale, Linux (Bash)

## High-Impact Projects
- **IndoRE**: NLP Relation Extraction for Low-Resource Languages (Bengali, Telugu, Hindi).
- **COLMAN**: Multi-Agent Embodied AI using Visual-Textual Embeddings (CLIP).
- **Automation Hub**: Diverse n8n workflows for enterprise productivity.
